claims_verified: Baidu Apollo Go operating in 16 Chinese cities
Pony.ai and WeRide both NYSE-listed and deployed in China + international markets
US-China robotaxi race framing with no single global leader

sources.title: The Impact of Robotaxis on Gig Worker Wages: Early Evidence and Future Outlook
claims_verified: Median driver earnings dropped 7% in Austin, 9% in Phoenix, 18.4% in LA (Jul 2024–Jul 2025)
1.5M US workers depend on driving for income
200K taxi drivers, 1.3M rideshare workers at risk of displacement

sources.title: Waymo Revenue, Funding & News (Sacra financial intelligence)
claims_verified: Waymo annualized revenue trajectory: $125M (2024) → $284M (end-2025) → $355M (Feb 2026)
Total outside investment history and cap table
Revenue per week breakdown by market

sources.title: 2026 Autonomous Vehicle Funding Hits $19B: Waymo Leads Industry Consolidation
claims_verified: Total AV sector funding in 2026: $19B

sources.title: Robotaxis in 2026 — Deployment, Safety, Accountability and Enterprise Impact
claims_verified: No federal AV liability framework as of early 2026
California CPUC most developed regulatory regime
Texas and Arizona significantly more permissive

sources.title: Waymo History Timeline — Key Milestones
claims_verified: First public driverless service: October 2020, Chandler Arizona
50K weekly rides milestone: May 2024
100M autonomous miles milestone: July 2025

unverified_claims.claim: ~120K/mo combined search volume for robotaxi + Waymo + self-driving car
unverified_claims.reason: Google Trends shows strong interest spikes but no exact monthly volume data was accessible; figure is an aggregated estimate
Calculated from market growth trajectory (near-zero commercial rides in 2021 to $0.61B market in 2025 per Grand View); exact 2021 baseline varies by methodology

unverified_claims.claim: Robotaxis reduce per-trip carbon emissions up to 70% vs private ICE vehicle
unverified_claims.reason: Environmental impact calculations vary by electricity grid mix and vehicle occupancy rate; 70% figure reflects best-case EV + shared mode assumptions
unverified_claims.confidence: low — directionally correct, exact figure is scenario-dependent

unverified_claims.claim: Waymo claims 85% fewer injury-causing crashes vs comparable human-driven vehicles
unverified_claims.reason: Waymo has published safety reports, but 85% figure is from an internal Waymo study; independent third-party validation is ongoing
